name: ADONIS
short_description: Adonis is a stylized, open world action game that focuses on third person combat & platforming!
detailed_description:
Adonis is a stylized, whimsical open world action game that focuses on fantasy combat! Get ready for an intense adventure in the open world of Candala!



  • Massive, functional & stylized (medieval & post-medieval) environments

  • Open world setting that features Everhaven Castle, The Ruins of Candala (Castle Ruins), and the Everhaven Caves

  • Check your ranking monthly on our official website (link from main menu)



Developed & Published by Lorenzo Entertainment

Lead Game Designer: Michael L. Fiorentino Gutierrez
Lead Programmer: Samuel Hall
Assistant Director of Server Operations: David Conta
Head of Community: Carlos Velez
HR Director: Emily Andrews
Head Online Gameplay Administrator: Alex Bay
Creative Consultant: Cameron Rogers

* NOTE: The initial November 13, 2020 Early Access retail release of 'Adonis' does not currently support RTX & DLSS features. Full RTX & DLSS implementation will be released on February 26, 2021. The Steam retail price for 'Adonis' will not be raised after RTX/DLSS implementation and the retail price will not be raised after full Steam release (October 1, 2021).
